---
title: "Lab Day 4_JWilson"
format: html
editor: visual
---

## Load Packages

```{r load_packages}

library(wooldridge)


library(pandoc) 
library(modelsummary)
library(flextable)
library(officer)

library(plm)
```

## Load Data

```{r import_data}

setwd("C:/Users/julie/Downloads/Seminar research/more r studio/Seminar research/Seminar_Preliminary")

final_data <- read.csv("final_data.csv")

```

## Data Cleaning

```{r data_cleaning}
# Fix all variables stored as text with symbols — strip and convert to numeric
final_data$snap_participation_rate <- as.numeric(gsub("%", "", final_data$snap_participation_rate))
final_data$infant_child_care_cost_burden <- as.numeric(gsub("%", "", final_data$infant_child_care_cost_burden))
final_data$telehealth_share <- as.numeric(gsub("%", "", final_data$telehealth_share))
final_data$single_mothers_median_monthly_income <- as.numeric(gsub("[$,]", "", final_data$single_mothers_median_monthly_income))
final_data$minimum_wage <- as.numeric(gsub("[$,]", "", final_data$minimum_wage))

# Create numeric time index for panel data
final_data$time <- as.numeric(factor(final_data$year_month))

# Convert categorical variables to factors
final_data$medicaid_expansion_status <- as.factor(final_data$medicaid_expansion_status)
final_data$shield_law_state <- as.factor(final_data$shield_law_state)
final_data$medicaid_abortion_funding_restrictions <- as.factor(final_data$medicaid_abortion_funding_restrictions)
```

## Pooled OLS

```{r pooled_ols}
pooled_model <- lm(abortions_per_1000_women_ages_1544 ~ 
                     months_since_dobbs +
                     snap_participation_rate +
                     tanf_one_parent_per1000_women_1544 +
                     CPI +
                     medicaid_expansion_status +
                     infant_child_care_cost_burden +
                     single_mothers_median_monthly_income +
                     state_unemployment_rate +
                     minimum_wage +
                     gestational_limit_weeks +
                     telehealth_share +
                     shield_law_state +
                     RPP_all_items,
                   data = final_data)

summary(pooled_model)
```

## First Difference

```{r first_difference}

# Declare panel structure
panel_data <- pdata.frame(final_data, index = c("State", "time"))

# First Difference model
fd_model <- plm(abortions_per_1000_women_ages_1544 ~ 
                  months_since_dobbs +
                  snap_participation_rate +
                  tanf_one_parent_per1000_women_1544 +
                  CPI +
                  infant_child_care_cost_burden +
                  single_mothers_median_monthly_income +
                  state_unemployment_rate +
                  minimum_wage +
                  gestational_limit_weeks +
                  telehealth_share +
                  RPP_all_items,
                data = panel_data,
                model = "fd")

print(summary(fd_model))

```

## Output table

```{r output_table}
n_models <- 2

tbl <- modelsummary(
  list("Pooled OLS" = pooled_model, "First Difference" = fd_model),
  output = "flextable",
  stars = c("*" = 0.1, "**" = 0.05, "***" = 0.01),
  gof_map = c("nobs", "r.squared", "adj.r.squared"),
  estimate  = "{estimate}{stars}",
  statistic = "({std.error})",
  title = "Table 1: Economic Effects of Abortion Restrictions Post-Dobbs",
  notes = "Standard errors in parentheses. * p<0.1, ** p<0.05, *** p<0.01"
)

# Add column numbers above model names
col_numbers <- c("", paste0("(", seq_len(n_models), ")"))

tbl <- flextable::set_header_labels(
  tbl,
  values = setNames(
    paste0("(", seq_len(n_models), ")"),
    paste0("Model ", seq_len(n_models))
  )
)

tbl <- flextable::add_header_row(tbl, values = col_numbers, colwidths = rep(1, n_models + 1), top = TRUE)

# Horizontal line below Adj. R2
n_rows <- nrow(tbl$body$dataset)
tbl <- flextable::hline(
  tbl,
  i = n_rows,
  border = fp_border(color = "black", width = 1),
  part = "body"
)

# Horizontal line below table note
tbl <- flextable::hline_bottom(
  tbl,
  border = fp_border(color = "black", width = 1),
  part = "footer"
)

tbl <- flextable::set_table_properties(tbl, width = 1, layout = "autofit")

# Save to Word — update path to your folder
save_as_docx(tbl, path = "C:/Users/julie/Downloads/Seminar research/more r studio/Seminar research/Seminar_Preliminary/abortion_results.docx")
```
